title: Implement Email Resend Feature
statement:
Implement a resend email feature. When a user requests an email resend, your API should verify if a resend is allowed within the last hour. If allowed, your API should generate a new unique verification link for the email and send it to the user's email. If not allowed, return an error message. 

Endpoints to implement: 
- POST /api/resend-email: Resend a verification email to a user's email address.
- GET /api/users/:id: Fetch a user by ID and return their email address.

Constraints: 
- Must use only the in-memory array of users provided.
- Must validate user ID existence before fetching email address.
- Must validate email address format before sending email.

Visible Test Cases: 
- Resend email to a user with a valid verification link.
- Attempt to resend email to a user with a resend allowed within the last hour.
- Attempt to resend email to a user with a resend not allowed within the last hour.

Hidden Test Cases: 
- Fetch a non-existent user by ID and return an error message.
- Fetch a user by ID with a missing email address.
- Attempt to resend email to a user with a malformed email address.
constraints: Must use only the in-memory array of users provided
Must validate user ID existence before fetching email address
Must validate email address format before sending email

endpoints.description: Resend a verification email to a user's email address.
Fetch a user by ID and return their email address.

expectedBody.error: Cannot resend within the last hour
